title: KVRouteValue
description: The value stored at KV key `route:<host>` and read by the serving Worker. This is the single cross-language data contract between the Go API (the only writer) and the Cloudflare Worker (read-only). See ARCHITECTURE.md §3/§6/§8. Postgres is authoritative; this projection is fully rebuildable.

org_id.description: Owning org (auth.organization.id / app.org_meta.id). Used to build the per-org R2 blob prefix.

version_id.description: The live, immutable version to serve (app.site_versions.id). Pointer flips on publish/rollback.

access_mode.description: How the Worker gates this host. Phase 1 implements `public` only; the rest are Phase 2.

schema_version.description: Version of THIS contract shape. Lets the Worker reject/upgrade projections written by an older/newer Go API. Bump on any breaking change to this schema. v2 (Phase 2) added the optional expires_at field; the parser accepts v1 and v2.

expires_at.description: OPTIONAL (v2+). RFC3339 timestamp after which the Worker refuses to serve this host — public/unlisted link expiry enforced at the edge. Absent → no edge expiry. Identity-gated (allowlist/org_only) expiry is refused at mint time in the Go API instead.
